title: Pear Pearls
description: A crunchy and adventurous Malaysian dish featuring pears air-fried to be both bitter and chewy, perfect for those with fodmap-friendly diets.
instructions: Trim off any stems and prepare as needed.
Gently cut each pear into small, even pieces to ensure uniform air-frying.
In a shallow dish, toss the pear pieces with olive oil until well coated.
Arrange the pear slices in a single layer on the basket of your air fryer.
Cook for approximately 7-9 minutes, flipping halfway through cooking time.
Check for doneness by pressing with a fork; they should be golden and crispy but still slightly chewy.
Remove from air fryer and serve immediately.
